2026-03-09Linear | Uber - DPP Setup
"So within the initiative layer, you can connect each initiative and sub initiative to a channel. So that's one way. But if you're saying like you want every single surface which I think we define surface is like the name and label kind of like we did here. I don't think there's going to be a way to say like by surface, we have this, I mean not to say you can't you can definitely do it with like a custom web hook running from linear to slack. I just don't think we're having anything out of the box to do that for you?"
